results.rendered_html:
akriya a. [nāsti kriyā yasya na. ba.]
1 Inactive, dull, torpid.
2 Without essential works.
3 Abstaining from religious rites.
4 Without
(pb) action of any kind, epithet of God.
5 Worthless, good for nothing.
— yā [na. ta] Inactivity; neglect of duty; pradhānasyākriyā yatra sāṃgaṃ tatkriyate punaḥ . tadaṃgasyākriyāyāṃ tu nāvṛttirna ca tatkriyā ..
